fields.label: Kind
fields.description: How this note was captured. Voice = recorder transcript; for Attachment/Link, transcript stays the user's own words/caption (optional) while extracted_text holds the server-extracted content.

fields.label: Transcript
fields.description: Required for Text/Voice notes (the user's own words); optional caption for Attachment/Link notes.

fields.label: URL
fields.description: Source link for Link-kind notes; must be http(s). Server-fetched at capture with SSRF guards (jarvis.chat.link_fetch, Wave B1); the fetched, readability-stripped text lands in extracted_text.

fields.label: Extracted Text
fields.description: Server-extracted content for Attachment/Link notes (readability-stripped page text, or bounded document text extraction). The daily sweep and immediate-ingest path read extracted_text || transcript.

fields.label: Conversation
fields.description: Required for Conversation-context notes; optional provenance for Business notes captured from a chat nudge.

fields.label: Question
fields.description: Set when this note was captured as the answer to a Personalise question.

fields.label: Entities
fields.description: Entities in view when the note was recorded: [{doctype, name}].

fields.label: Processed Note
fields.description: What the daily sweep did with this note (facts extracted / wiki ingest queued / nothing durable found).
